metacomprehension.description: In this section, please evaluate your experience during the reading task. First, please evaluate how well you understood the text you just read. Choose a number between 0 to 100 that best reflects your level of understanding. Second, you will rate how mentally demanding the task was using a 7-point Likert scale (1 = Not at all, 7 = Very much).

questions.question:
How well did you understand the text you just read?
Please choose a number between 0 to 100 that best reflect your understanding of the text.

cognitiveLoad.question: For this reading activity, many things needed to be kept in mind simultaneously.
The reading activity was very complex.
During this reading activity, it was exhausting to find the important information.
The design of the reading task was very inconvenient for learning.
During this reading activity, it was difficult to recognize and link the crucial information.

attentionCheck.question: In the case study, what is the name of the company that Aliyah Jones works for?
